headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Rollins (ROL) After This Year’s Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Rollins at US$53.42 is offering value right now, the stock’s recent performance and valuation checks give you some clear starting points to assess. The share price is up 1.0% over the last week, although it is down 2.9% over the past month, down 9.5% year to date and down 5.8% over the past year, while still showing gains of 36.5% over three years and 65.7% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on Rollins as an established player in commercial services,...
